name: Capital One Venture X
description: Premium travel card with 2x miles on all purchases, $300 annual travel credit, and 10k bonus miles every anniversary. Best for frequent travelers looking for luxury perks.

name: Capital One SavorOne
description: No annual fee card with 3% cash back on dining, entertainment, popular streaming services, and at grocery stores. Best for foodies and entertainment lovers.

name: Capital One Quicksilver
description: Simple 1.5% cash back on every purchase, every day. No annual fee. Best for those who want straightforward rewards without tracking categories.

name: Capital One Platinum
description: A straightforward card to help you build your credit. No annual fee and no hidden fees. Best for those starting their credit journey.
